zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Edmund Arundel於大約1329年出生在英國素可阿盧德爾時，他的父親Sir Richard FitzAlan 10th Earl of Arundel24歲，母親Isabel le Despenser18歲。他於1349年7月之前與Sybil Montagu結婚。他們至少是3個女兒的父母。他去世於1382年2月12日之前在英國，埋葬在英國英格蘭素可阿盧德爾。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Edmund Arundel于大约1329年出生在英国素可阿盧德爾时，他的父亲Sir Richard FitzAlan 10th Earl of Arundel24岁，母亲Isabel le Despenser18岁。他于1349年7月之前与Sybil Montagu结婚。他们至少是3个女儿的父母。他去世于1382年2月12日之前在英国，埋葬在英国英格兰素可阿盧德爾。

nameMeanings.name: Arundel
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: (of Norman origin): nickname from Old French arondel ‘little swallow’ (a diminutive of arond ‘swallow’, from Latin hirundo).

habitational name from a place so named in West Sussex, from Old English hārhūne ‘horehound’ (a wild plant, Marrubium vulgare) + dell ‘valley’. This place is the seat of the dukes of Norfolk. In northern England, folk etymology resulted in variants such as Arendale .

variants.name: Arrindell
meanings: West Indian (Dutch Caribbean and the Dominican Republic): probably an altered form of English   Arundel  .

nameMeanings.name: Edmund
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old English personal name derived from ēad ‘prosperity, riches’ + mund ‘protector’. It was borne by several early royal and saintly figures, including a 9th-century king of East Anglia killed by invading Danes, allegedly for his adherence to Christianity. In the 16th and 17th centuries, there was a good deal of interchange between Edmund and Edward.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Edmund Arundel was born about 1329, in Arundel, Sussex, England, his father, Sir Richard FitzAlan 10th Earl of Arundel, was 24 and his mother, Isabel le Despenser, was 18. He married Sybil Montagu before July 1349. They were the parents of at least 3 daughters. He died before 12 February 1382, in England, and was buried in Arundel, Sussex, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Edmund Arundel est né environ 1329, à Arundel, Sussex, Angleterre, son père, Sir Richard FitzAlan 10th Earl of Arundel, avait 24 ans et sa mère, Isabel le Despenser, avait 18 ans. Il a épousé Sybil Montagu avant juillet 1349. Ils ont eu au moins 3 filles. Il est décédé avant 12 février 1382, à Angleterre, et a été enterré à Arundel, Sussex, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir Edmund Arundel um 1329 in Arundel, Sussex, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir Richard FitzAlan 10th Earl of Arundel 24 und seine Mutter Isabel le Despenser 18. Er hat vor Juli 1349 Sybil Montagu geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Töchter. Er starb vor 12. Februar 1382 in England und wurde in Arundel, Sussex, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Edmund Arundel è nato il circa 1329 nel Arundel, Sussex, England, il suo padre, Sir Richard FitzAlan 10th Earl of Arundel, aveva 24 anni e il suo madre, Isabel le Despenser, aveva 18 anni. Lui sposato Sybil Montagu prima del luglio 1349. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figlie. Morì prima del 12 febbraio 1382, nel England, e fu sepolto a Arundel, Sussex, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Edmund Arundelが約1329年にイギリススセックスアルンデルで生まれた時，父Sir Richard FitzAlan 10th Earl of Arundelは24歳，母Isabel le Despenserは18歳であった。1349年7月以前にSybil Montaguと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の娘の親であった。彼は1382年2月12日以前にイギリスで死去し，イギリスイギリススセックスアルンデルにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Edmund Arundel(이)가 대략 1329년 영국 수세스 아런들에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Richard FitzAlan 10th Earl of Arundel(은)는 24세였고, 그의 어머니 Isabel le Despenser(은)는 18세였다. 그는 1349년 7월 이전 Sybil Montagu(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1382년 2월 12일 이전 영국에서 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 수세스 아런들에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Edmund Arundel nasceu aproximadamente 1329, em Arundel, Sussex, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir Richard FitzAlan 10th Earl of Arundel, tinha 24 anos e sua mãe, Isabel le Despenser, tinha 18 anos. Ele casou-se com Sybil Montagu antes julho de 1349. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhas. Ele faleceu antes 12 de fevereiro de 1382, em Inglaterra, e foi sepultado em Arundel, Sussex, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Edmund Arundel родился около 1329 г. в местности арундель, суссекс, Англия, его отцу по имени Sir Richard FitzAlan 10th Earl of Arundel было 24 года, а матери, которую звали Isabel le Despenser, 18. Он женился на женщине по имени Sybil Montagu перед июля 1349 г. У них было по крайней мере 3 дочери. Он умер перед 12 февраль 1382 г. в местности Англия и был похоронен в местности арундель, суссекс, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir Edmund Arundel nació aproximadamente 1329, en Arundel, Sussex, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir Richard FitzAlan 10th Earl of Arundel, tenía 24 años y su mamá, Isabel le Despenser, tenía 18 años. Se casó con Sybil Montagu antes de julio de 1349. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijas. Murió antes de 12 de febrero de 1382, en Inglaterra, y fue sepultado en Arundel, Sussex, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
